SEQUENCE.COMMENT: lookup - service for performing a single record TFW_UXLR lookup by keys only

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, fail the transaction (default)
1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message

INVOKE.NAME: tableCode=='' || numKeys < 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 Input parameters required tableCode='%tableCode%' key01='%key01%'

Values.value: FE0000 Input parameters required tableCode='%tableCode%' key01='%key01%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, fail the transaction (default)
1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: read the metadata about the tablecode (number of defined keys and values)

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT * FROM TFW_UXLR WHERE fKey00='0-uxlr' AND fKey01='tabledata' AND fKey02='%tableCode%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, fail the transaction (default)
1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TFW_UXLR WHERE fKey00='0-uxlr' AND fKey01='tabledata' AND fKey02='%tableCode%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, fail the transaction (default)
1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, fail the transaction (default)
1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message

BRANCH.COMMENT: check that they supplied the correct number of keys or didnt supply too many values

INVOKE.NAME: numKeys != sNumkeys
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 You supplied %numKeys% keys - the table has %sNumkeys% defined

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, fail the transaction (default)
1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message

Values.value: FE0000 You supplied %numKeys% keys - the table has %sNumkeys% defined

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, fail the transaction (default)
1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 Metadata for %tableCode% could not be found - please check spelling

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, fail the transaction (default)
1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message

Values.value: FE0000 Metadata for %tableCode% could not be found - please check spelling

1 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message
